steps: Given a RiskEvaluationInput for "cart-high-risk-02" with high-velocity signals
When I call evaluateCheckoutRisk
Then the response outcome should be "block"
And the score should exceed the block threshold
title: Deterministic scoring for high-risk signals

steps: Given a RiskEvaluationInput containing a credit card PAN
When I call evaluateCheckoutRisk
Then the record in "risk_evaluation_events" should have "scrubbed_input" without the PAN
title: PII Scrubbing before persistence

steps: Given a cart "cart-happy-01" with no prior risk evaluation
When I POST to "/checkout/submit"
Then the response status should be 400 RISK_EVAL_REQUIRED
title: Submit blocked without prior evaluation

steps: Given a risk evaluation for "cart-high-risk-02" with outcome "block"
When I POST to "/checkout/submit"
Then the response status should be 403 RISK_DECLINED
And no ledger commit should be recorded
title: Blocked outcome prevents ledger commit

steps: Given a risk evaluation for "cart-review-03" with outcome "review"
When I POST to "/checkout/submit"
Then the response status should be 202 Accepted
And a new case should exist in "risk_review_cases" with status "open"
title: Review outcome creates case and returns 202

steps: Given the feature flag "checkout.risk_shadow_mode" is ON
And a risk evaluation for "cart-high-risk-02" with outcome "block"
When I POST to "/checkout/submit"
Then the response status should be 200 OK
title: Shadow mode allows blocked orders

steps: Given an "open" case in "risk_review_cases" for "cart-review-03"
When "support-agent@acme.com" applies a "risk_override"
Then the case status should be "approved"
And a subsequent POST to "/checkout/submit" should return 200 OK
title: Support override allows checkout

steps: Given an "open" case exists for "org-acme-01"
When "charlie@globex.com" attempts to GET the case details
Then the response status should be 403 Forbidden
title: Multi-tenant isolation for review cases

steps: Given no authentication token
When I POST to "/checkout/risk-eval"
Then the response status should be 401 Unauthorized
title: Unauthenticated risk evaluation

steps: Given a risk evaluation for "cart-happy-01" with "quote-v1"
And the cart quote is updated to "quote-v2"
When I POST to "/checkout/submit"
Then the response status should be 400 RISK_EVAL_REQUIRED
title: Quote version mismatch forces re-evaluation

steps: Given the feature flag "checkout.risk_gate_enabled" is OFF
When I POST to "/checkout/submit" for a cart with no evaluation
Then the response status should be 200 OK
title: Feature gate kill-switch

steps: When I call evaluateCheckoutRisk 100 times
Then the p95 latency should be less than 200ms
title: Latency target

steps: Perform risk evaluation for a suspicious cart resulting in "review" outcome
Submit checkout and verify 202 Accepted status
Approve the review case via support override API
Submit checkout again and verify 200 OK
title: Full risk-gated checkout journey
